title: Red Sun: Reborn
description: A remake of the Red Sun from those old cursed seed Minecraft videos.
body:
As a kid, you probably saw one of those "I PLAYED THE RED SUN CURSED SEED IN MY MINECRAFT WORLD" Minecraft videos, and always wanted to try it for yourself. Turns out, the Red Sun was only a resource pack and commands. But here, I remade the Red Sun for everyone to enjoy!

When the Red Sun rises, it will burn every mob and player, shoot fireballs from above, and kill plants.

_Use code ITSSMUDGY for 25% off: [https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy](https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy)_

_Join our Discord: [https://discord.gg/hVcqt4vzbu](https://discord.gg/hVcqt4vzbu)_

_Support me on Ko-Fi: [https://ko-fi.com/itssmudgy](https://ko-fi.com/itssmudgy)_

**This mod requires Geckolib**
